findings.title: ADR-0006 (accepted) was directly edited to add an Erratum section, violating the append-only rule
findings.detail: docs/decisions/0006-retell-default-voice.md has status: accepted in its frontmatter, yet a new ## Erratum (2026-05-30) section was appended to the file body by the 2026-05-30 nightly audit. AGENTS.md §7 prohibits editing accepted ADRs. The erratum text even says 'ADR body is preserved verbatim per the append-only invariant' then immediately violates that claim.
findings.fix_sketch: Create ADR-0011 as proper superseder, update ADR-0006 status to superseded, update DECISIONS.md index.

findings.title: ROADMAP 'Next cycle' window (2026-05-21 → 2026-06-04) expired today with no completion evidence and no reconciliation banner
findings.detail: ROADMAP.md §Next states 'next cycle — ~2 weeks, 2026-05-21 → 2026-06-04'. Today is 2026-06-04, the end-date of that window, and none of the milestones M-016 through M-019 are delivered. The section header had no reconciliation banner unlike the 'Now' section. SPRINT-2026-05-B was never created.
findings.fix_sketch: Add a reconciliation banner to the 'Next' section and update the section header date to reflect the expired/undelivered cycle.

findings.title: KPI.md KR4 deadline (2026-06-04) passed today with confidence=6 and no active sprint
findings.detail: KPI.md OKR KR4 reads: 'First Discord 8am digest contains at least 5 days of real data — DUE 2026-06-04 (depends on M-018).' That deadline is today. M-018 (Discord 8am digest) has not been built. The existing audit banner only called out KR1 as missed and KR2 at-risk; KR4's deadline has now also passed unmet.
findings.fix_sketch: Add KR4 to the missed/at-risk audit note. Mark KR4 as MISSED. Update KR4 confidence from 6 to 0.

findings.title: AGENTS.md §8 cites 'NON_GOALS.md NG-7' as 'smoke-test-first rationale' but NG-7 is a sprint-scoped test-debt trade-off, not a general philosophy
findings.detail: AGENTS.md §8 Testing says 'For client repos, see NON_GOALS.md NG-7 (smoke-test-first rationale)'. NG-7 in NON_GOALS.md is titled 'Comprehensive test coverage for new IFleet gaps' with a sprint-specific rationale. The description 'smoke-test-first rationale' overstates what NG-7 actually says.
findings.fix_sketch: Change the parenthetical to accurately describe NG-7 as an intentional test-debt trade-off for sprint velocity.

findings.title: UBIQUITOUS_LANGUAGE.md 'Protected Path' lists ADR-0001 as its source, but ADR-0001 does not define or describe Protected Paths
findings.detail: The Protected Path glossary entry cites 'Source: ADR-0001, SECURITY.md'. ADR-0001 is about AGENTS.md as primary / CLAUDE.md as bridge — it says nothing about Protected Paths. The correct source is ARCHITECTURE.md §5 invariant #5 and SECURITY.md §Protected-Paths.
findings.fix_sketch: Change the Source line to: 'Source: ARCHITECTURE.md §5 (invariant 5), SECURITY.md §Protected-Paths'.

findings.title: SECURITY.md Killswitches section references M-019 for Discord command bridge but M-019 is the cost-tracking dashboard
findings.detail: SECURITY.md §Killswitches says 'Discord command bridge planned (M-019).' ROADMAP.md defines M-019 as 'Cost-tracking dashboard'. The Discord command bridge for killswitch toggling is not part of M-019's success criteria.
findings.fix_sketch: Remove the M-019 reference from the Killswitches toggling note and clarify that the Discord command bridge for killswitches is not yet scoped into a milestone.

findings.title: ROADMAP M-015 depends-on field uses non-parseable range syntax '[M-001 through M-014]' instead of explicit array
findings.detail: ROADMAP.md M-015 has 'depends-on: [M-001 through M-014]' — a human-readable range rather than the explicit array format all other milestones use. The decomposer's regex that matches individual [M-NNN] bracketed IDs will not extract dependencies for M-015 correctly per ARCHITECTURE.md §7.
findings.fix_sketch: Replace 'depends-on: [M-001 through M-014]' with the explicit array listing M-001 through M-014.

findings.title: AGENTS.md §2 required reading list has 18 items but is headed '17 spec files'; CLAUDE.md not clarified as bridge-only
findings.detail: The numbered list in AGENTS.md §2 goes to item 18 (CLAUDE.md), yet the surrounding context throughout the codebase refers to '17 spec files'. Workers counting the list get 18, creating confusion. CLAUDE.md is a bridge file, not a spec file, but this is not stated.
findings.fix_sketch: Add a parenthetical to item 18 clarifying that CLAUDE.md is the Claude Code entry point and not counted in the 17 spec files.

findings.title: ADR-0002 title says 'Four-repo structure' but subtitle lists five distinct repo types
findings.detail: ADR-0002 frontmatter title reads 'Four-repo structure: Factory + IFleet + voice-discovery + spec-template + per-client' — that subtitle lists five items. The DECISIONS.md index repeats the same contradiction. Workers counting repos get confused.
findings.fix_sketch: Update DECISIONS.md index title to clarify: 'Four-repo structure (Factory + IFleet + voice-discovery + spec-template + N per-client repos)' making clear per-client is N additional, not counted as one.

findings.title: CHANGELOG.md initial scaffold entry states '22 domain terms + 24 events' but UBIQUITOUS_LANGUAGE.md now has 27 terms + 26 events
findings.detail: CHANGELOG.md 'Added' section says 'UBIQUITOUS_LANGUAGE.md — 22 domain terms + 24 events'. The file currently contains 27 glossary terms and 26 events. The counts were accurate at initial scaffold but have drifted.
findings.fix_sketch: Add a 'Changed' entry noting the updated counts since initial scaffold.

findings.title: Gap numbering in ROADMAP is non-sequential vs the Gap glossary ordered list, creating confusion for workers mapping Gaps to milestones
findings.detail: UBIQUITOUS_LANGUAGE.md §Gap lists Gaps 1-8 in order but ROADMAP milestones implement them out of order (M-002=Gap1, M-003=Gap2, M-004=Gap5, M-008=Gap4, M-009=Gap6, M-014=Gap3, M-012=Gap7, M-013=Gap8). Workers reading the glossary and then the roadmap expect sequential implementation.
findings.fix_sketch: Add a note to the Gap definition clarifying that Gap numbers are logical IDs, not build-sequence order.

findings.title: INTEGRATIONS.md Anthropic Claude entry references 'Phase B decision' without a cross-reference
findings.detail: INTEGRATIONS.md §Anthropic Claude purpose says 'Sonnet default, Opus on complexity:high per Phase B decision'. 'Phase B' is IFleet-internal jargon not defined in this repo's ubiquitous language or any ADR. Readers have no way to follow this reference.
findings.fix_sketch: Replace 'per Phase B decision' with a traceable reference to IFleet model routing decision 2026-05-12 per STAKEHOLDERS.md decision log.

findings.title: ARCHITECTURE.md frontmatter related_adrs omits ADR-0005 and ADR-0009 which are referenced in its body
findings.detail: ARCHITECTURE.md frontmatter lists related_adrs: [ADR-0001, ADR-0002, ADR-0003, ADR-0007, ADR-0010] but ADR-0005 (Tier 3 default OFF, referenced via killswitch table in §6) and ADR-0009 (data classification, referenced via §6 table) are missing.
findings.fix_sketch: Add ADR-0005 and ADR-0009 to the frontmatter related_adrs array.

findings.title: UBIQUITOUS_LANGUAGE.md Sprint entry source says 'ADR-0008-ish (Shape Up adopted; full ADR pending)' — the pending ADR has never been written and ADR-0008 is about MADR format, not Shape Up
findings.detail: The Sprint glossary source reads: 'ADR-0008-ish (Shape Up adopted; full ADR pending)'. ADR-0008 is about MADR format. No ADR covering Shape Up sprint methodology adoption exists. This placeholder has been open since 2026-05-15 (~20 days).
findings.fix_sketch: Replace the placeholder with an accurate source citation: Sebastian 2026-05-15 conversation; no formal ADR written, decision self-evident. Note that ADR-0008 covers ADR format, not sprint methodology.

findings.title: NON_GOALS.md NoGo-1 cites ADR-0004 as its source but ADR-0004 is about build-first sprint strategy, not productization scope
findings.detail: NON_GOALS.md NoGo-1 ('The Factory is NOT a productized dev tool') ends with 'Documented: ADR-0004'. ADR-0004 is titled 'Build full pipeline before client #1 (no manual shortcuts)' and covers sprint strategy. Workers looking up ADR-0004 to understand why The Factory isn't productized would find unrelated content.
findings.fix_sketch: Remove or replace the incorrect ADR-0004 reference with an accurate source indicating this is a Sebastian scope decision from 2026-05-12.
